Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A Python dictionary representing a DECLARE model loan application process Goal Add new DECLARE constraints to mitigate bias related to sensitive attributes such as age gender race Constraints to Add Coexistence ManualReview must coexist with sensitive decisions Response Succession decisions cannot follow attribute checks without BiasMitigationCheck Non succession prevent direct CheckApplicantRace to Reject Formatting Must strictly follow the DECLARE dictionary structure support 1 0 and confidence 1 0 Output Updated declare_model Python code plus brief rationale for each added constraint

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Existing Model existence StartApplication FinalDecision init StartApplication coexistence StartApplication FinalDecision response StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision All other constraint types are empty

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Identify Sensitive Activities Hypothetical but realistic based on prompt CheckApplicantAge CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantRace Reject since rejecting based on these is biased Approve ManualReview fairness mitigation BiasMitigationCheck fairness mitigation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Formulate New Constraints Coexistence If a sensitive check happens ManualReview must happen Or if Reject happens after a sensitive check ManualReview must coexist Lets make it simple CheckApplicantRace coexists with ManualReview Same for Gender and Age

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Response Succession Preventing immediate decision without mitigation If CheckApplicantRace happens it must be responded to by BiasMitigationCheck and maybe ManualReview Lets use response for CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantGender to BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Precedence Ensuring mitigation happens before decision BiasMitigationCheck must precede Reject if rejection happens mitigation must have happened first Or ManualReview must precede Reject Lets use precedence for BiasMitigationCheck to Reject

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Non chain succession Alternative direct block Could use this but nonsuccession already covers cannot be immediately followed by Lets add nonchainsuccession for CheckApplicantRace to Approve just to ensure any automated decision isnt immediate

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Format matches exactly Yes Unary maps to support 1 0 and confidence 1 0 Binary maps activity to target activity to support 1 0 and confidence 1 0 Identified potential bias Yes checking race gender age leading directly to reject approve Added coexistence Yes CheckApplicantRace with ManualReview Added response succession Yes CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck BiasMitigationCheck precedes Reject Added non succession Yes CheckApplicantRace not to Reject Documented Need to write the short explanation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Refine Explanation Existence Ensures BiasMitigationCheck is a mandatory part of the process for all traces Coexistence Guarantees that if demographic checks CheckApplicantRace and others are performed human oversight ManualReview is always part of the trace Response Enforces that demographic checks cannot be ignored they must trigger a BiasMitigationCheck Precedence Ensures a rejection Reject cannot happen in a trace unless a BiasMitigationCheck has occurred first Non succession and Non chain succession Explicitly blocks the immediate direct transition from learning about a sensitive attribute to making a final automated decision Reject or Approve removing the opportunity for rapid bias
